name: browser-help-visual-sequence
expectedLine: Use the dock to switch between Files, Text Editor, Terminal, Firefox, and Thunderbird.

reviewChecks.label: Requested line card does not overlap surrounding body text
reviewChecks.expectation: The requested line card is visually separated from nearby help copy and no text collisions are visible.

reviewChecks.label: Typed note line is not clipped by the line gutter or save button area
reviewChecks.expectation: Typed note text remains readable in the editor body without overlapping the gutter, toolbar, or save affordance.

args.text: Use the dock to switch between Files, Text Editor, Terminal, Firefox, and Thunderbird.
